articles.title: May 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to July 15, 2014
articles.excerpt: May 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.
articles.what_this_means: May 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.
